dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: They called him Killer. The strongest hero. The one who always got the job done.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But even the strongest can fall.

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.line: Gah!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BLADE! SLASH!

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.line: You... you bastards! After everything...

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.line: This isn't how it ends for me. Not like this!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD! CRACK!

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.line: (My vision... fading. My body... breaking. They surrounded me. All of them. The 'heroes' I fought alongside.)

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.line: (The Hero Killer... he got to them. Or did he just expose the rot that was always there?)

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.line: (My power... gone. Drained. Betrayed.)

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.line: You... will... regret... this...

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GURGLE. SILENCE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And so, the hero known as Killer died. Betrayed by those he protected.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But death, it seems, was merely a transition.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BEEP... BEEP... BEEP...

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (What is this sound? My head... it's pounding.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASP!

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (My body... it feels so... weak. Fragile. Not my own.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (Where am I? This isn't the battlefield. This isn't my apartment.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: PANT... PANT...

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (I can barely move. My muscles ache with just this much effort.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (This room... it's a dump. A squalid, forgotten corner of the city.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (And this face... in the cracked mirror shard... it's not mine.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (Who is this scrawny kid? Why am I in his body?)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GROAN.

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (A villain's uniform? Tattered, but unmistakable. A low-tier grunt, by the looks of it.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (The last thing I remember... the betrayal. The Hero Killer's smirk as I bled out.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (They thought they could just erase me. Dispose of me like trash.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (But I'm still here. In this pathetic body, yes, but I'm here.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (Gwon Gyeol, huh? That's the name stitched onto this uniform.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (Fine. Let them think Killer is dead. Let them celebrate their victory.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (I'll take this new life. This new identity. And I will make them pay.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (The 'heroes' who betrayed me. The Hero Killer who orchestrated it all.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (They will all fall. And this time, it won't be as a hero.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (I will become the ultimate villain. A villain to kill them all.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRUMBLE (a piece of the wall as he pushes himself up).

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (First, I need power. This body is useless. But I know how to get strong.)

dialogue.speaker: Gwon Gyeol (Cassian)
dialogue.line: (This world will learn to fear the name Gwon Gyeol.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SMASH (his fist against the crumbling wall, a small crater forms).

summary: The legendary hero 'Killer' is betrayed and murdered by his fellow heroes. He awakens in the weak body of a low-level villain named Gwon Gyeol, immediately vowing to exact his revenge on those who wronged him and become the ultimate villain.
